name: Cross-Platform Terminal Commander
description: Executes system commands and installs dependencies across Windows, Mac, and Linux using the run_command tool.
preconditions: task requires running a terminal command
task requires installing a package or dependency
postconditions: output contains the result of the command execution
evidence_requirements: uses the run_command tool via JSON output

steps.text: Identify the OS and determine the correct command syntax (PowerShell/cmd for Windows, bash for Linux/Mac)
Output the JSON tool call for run_command
